issue 4
1. There's more NINJA crammed into this month's TPM than any month to date! Marketing legend
Dean "The Marketing Buddha" Jackson joins me, along with his in house Facebook conversion and
traffic expert Nate Mohr. However, this isn't just any old "Facebook traffic" tutorial video: this is the
video that reveals EVERY STEP Dean and Nate take to generate (get this) 300% more clicks on
their Facebook ads (including dissecting every word of their ad copy), PLUS how they are earning
(get this) 300% ROI "minimum" on their ads. That means if they spend $100, they make $300 within
30 days. Now THAT is priceless information!
2. Dean also covers as a bonus his famous "9 Word Email" that is so powerful it was written up in
Success Magazine this month. We'll cover exactly what it is, and how you can use it to generate far
more engagement, especially with 'dead' readers potentials on your list that haven't opened an
email in over 90 days. The power of this 9 word email is literally worth years of your subscription
price to TPM, so get out some paper and something to write with, and DIG IN.
